wpr_custom_css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;500;700&family=Lato:wght@300;400&display=swap'); #mg-wprm-wrap,#mg-wprm-wrap *{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap{background:#fafafa!important;} #wprmenu_bar{background:#fef3c7!important;border-bottom:2px solid #78350f!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif!important;font-size:15px!important;letter-spacing:.06em;padding:14px 28px!important;color:#78350f!important;position:relative;transition:all .3s;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:28px;right:28px;height:1px;background:#d4af37;transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .3s;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a:hover::after{transform:scaleX(1);} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a:hover{color:#d4af37!important;background:rgba(212,175,55,.05)!important;} .elegance-header{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fef3c7,#fdf6e2);padding:30px 28px 22px;text-align:center;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(120,53,15,.1);} .elegance-header .gold-line{width:60px;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#d4af37,transparent);margin:0 auto 14px;} .elegance-header h4{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif!important;color:#78350f;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;margin:0 0 4px;letter-spacing:.05em;} .elegance-header span{font-family:'Lato',sans-serif!important;color:#92400e;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;}
content_after_menu_element: Follow Us
